section.heading: Investment policies
section.chapeau: The Board shall develop investment policies under section 8472(f)(1) of this title which provide for—

paragraph.content: prudent investments suitable for accumulating funds for payment of retirement income; and

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 99–335, title I, § 101(a), June 6, 1986, 100 Stat. 581.)
